facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this place. Locals are filling their plates for under $10. Cơm chay tự chọn Bồ Đề Chay on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is a pick-your-own vegetarian rice spot that Phu Quoc regulars actually eat at. 4.7 stars across 230 reviews. The kind of lunch that costs nothing and hits everything. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Pointing at dishes, filling a tray, paying under $10. That's lunch at Cơm chay tự chọn Bồ Đề Chay. 4.7 stars, 230 reviews, and zero tourists in line. This is how locals eat in Phu Quoc.
